labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621210 ($68,162,032,616) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621210 ($160,195,607,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $155,235 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621210); class <5: 45,904 firms, avg revenue/firm $422,294 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $66,722 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 42,843 firms, avg revenue/firm $957,190 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $151,236 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 24,748 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,831,475 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $289,373 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 6,486 firms, avg revenue/firm $4,762,168 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $752,422 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 369 firms, avg revenue/firm $20,229,282 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,196,227 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 138 firms, avg revenue/firm $116,843,196 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $18,461,225 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 369
